tavily.answer: Recent developments in Thailand include a train collision in Bangkok that resulted in at least eight deaths and 25 injuries. The train driver has been charged with negligence. Additionally, the Thai government is investing in securing the Gulf of Thailand amid ongoing tensions with Cambodia, including a recent incident where Cambodia laid mines on the Thai side of the border. Political shifts in Thailand are also notable, with former Prime Minister Thaksin Shinawatra being released early after receiving a royal pardon. Meanwhile, diplomatic tensions have risen as Cambodia has turned to a UN mechanism to challenge Thailand over contested maritime boundaries.
